---
title: "测试"
description: |
  <=test_place_holder=>
author:
  - name: "<=test_place_holder=>"
    url: "https://example.com/<=test_place_holder=>"
    affiliation: "<=test_place_holder=>"
    affiliation_url: "https://example.com/<=test_place_holder=>"
date: 2026-06-05
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  function injectArticleBadge() {
    var h1 = document.querySelector("d-title h1, .d-title h1");
    if (!h1 || h1.querySelector(".title-badge-slot")) return;
    h1.classList.add("post-title-row");
    var slot = document.createElement("span");
    slot.className = "title-badge-slot";
    slot.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
    var img = document.createElement("img");
    img.src = "title-badge.png";
    img.alt = "";
    slot.appendChild(img);
    h1.appendChild(slot);
  }
  function schedule() {
    injectArticleBadge();
    setTimeout(injectArticleBadge, 100);
    setTimeout(injectArticleBadge, 500);
  }
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", schedule);
  window.addEventListener("WebComponentsReady", schedule);
  window.addEventListener("load", schedule);
})();
</script>
```

<=test_place_holder=>
